title: Narmada Chalisa
intro: Shri Narmada Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Narmada
description:
|| Shri Narmada Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Devi pujit Narmada.
Mahima badi apar.
Chalisa varnan karat.
Kavi aru bhakt udar.
Inki seva se sada.
Mitate paap mahan.
Tat par kar jap daan nar.
Paate hain nit gyaan.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai-jai-jai Narmada Bhavani.
Tumhari mahima sab jag jaani.
Amarkanth se nikli Mata.
Sarv siddhi nav nidhi ki daata.
Kanya roop sakal gun khani.
Jab prakatin Narmada Bhavani.
Saptami surya Makar ravivara.
Ashwani Magh maas avtara.
Vahan Makar aapko saajain.
Kamal pushp par aap virajain.
Brahma Hari Har tumko dhyavain.
Tab hi manvanchhit phal pavain.
Darshan karat paap kati jaate.
Koti bhakt gan nitya nahate.
Jo nar tumko nit hi dhyavai.
Vah nar Rudra lok ko javain.
Magarmachha tum mein sukh pavain.
Antim samay parampad pavain.
Mastak mukut sada hi saajain.
Paon paijani nit hi rajain.
Kal-kal dhwani karti ho Mata.
Paap taap harti ho Mata.
Poorab se Pashchim ki ora.
Bahtin Mata nachat mora.
Shaunak rishi tumharau gun gavain.
Soot aadi tumharaun yash gavain.
Shiv Ganesh bhi tere gun gavain.
Sakal dev gan tumko dhyavain.
Koti tirth Narmada kinare.
Ye sab kehlate dukh haare.
Manokamna pooran karti.
Sarv dukh Maa nit hi hartin.
Kankhal mein Ganga ki mahima.
Kurukshetra mein Saraswati mahima.
Par Narmada gram jungle mein.
Nit rahti Mata mangal mein.
Ek baar kar ke snana.
Tarat pidhi hai nar nara.
Mekal kanya tum hi Rewa.
Tumhari bhajan karen nit deva.
Jata Shankari naam tumhara.
Tumne koti janon ko hai tara.
Samodbhava Narmada tum ho.
Paap mochani Rewa tum ho.
Tumhari mahima kahi nahin jaayi.
Karat na banti Matu badai.
Jal pratap tummein ati Mata.
Jo ramaniya tatha sukh daata.
Chaal sarpini sam hai tumhari.
Mahima ati apar hai tumhari.
Tum mein padi asthi bhi bhari.
Chhuwat pashan hot var vari.
Yamuna mein jo manuj nahata.
Saat dino mein vah phal paata.
Saraswati teen dino mein deti.
Ganga turat baad hi deti.
Par Rewa ka darshan karke.
Manav phal paata man bhar ke.
Tumhari mahima hai ati bhari.
Jisko gaate hain nar-nari.
Jo nar tum mein nitya nahata.
Rudra lok mein pooja jaata.
Jadi butiyan tat par raajain.
Mohak drishya sada hi saajain.
Vayu sugandhit chalti teera.
Jo harti nar tan ki peera.
Ghat-ghat ki mahima bhari.
Kavi bhi gaa nahin sakte saari.
Nahin jaanun main tumhari pooja.
Aur sahara nahin mam dooja.
Ho prasann upar mam Mata.
Tum hi Matu moksh ki daata.
Jo manav yah nit hai padhta.
Uska maan sada hi badhta.
Jo shat baar ise hai gaata.
Vah vidya dhan daulat paata.
Aganit baar padhai jo koi.
Pooran manokamna hoi.
Sabke ur mein basat Narmada.
Yahan vahan sarvatra Narmada.

|| Doha ||
Bhakti bhav ur aani ke.
Jo karta hai jaap.
Mata ji ki kripa se.
Door hot santap.
meaning:
|| Shri Narmada Chalisa ||

|| Doha ||
Devi pujit Narmada.
Devi Narmada is worshiped.
Mahima badi apar.
Her glory is immense.
Chalisa varnan karat.
I am describing this Chalisa.
Kavi aru bhakt udar.
As a poet and a generous devotee.
Inki seva se sada.
By serving her, always.
Mitate paap mahan.
Great sins are wiped away.
Tat par kar jap daan nar.
Men who chant and donate on her banks.
Paate hain nit gyaan.
Attain knowledge daily.

|| Chaupai ||
Jai-jai-jai Narmada Bhavani.
Victory, victory, victory to Mother Narmada.
Tumhari mahima sab jag jaani.
Your glory is known to the whole world.
Amarkanth se nikli Mata.
O Mother, you originated from Amarkantak.
Sarv siddhi nav nidhi ki daata.
You are the giver of all accomplishments and the nine treasures.
Kanya roop sakal gun khani.
In the form of a maiden, you are a mine of all virtues.
Jab prakatin Narmada Bhavani.
When Mother Narmada manifested.
Saptami surya Makar ravivara.
On the seventh day, Sunday, in the month of Makar (Capricorn).
Ashwani Magh maas avtara.
You incarnated in the Magh month under the Ashwini constellation.
Vahan Makar aapko saajain.
The crocodile vehicle adorns you.
Kamal pushp par aap virajain.
You reside upon a lotus flower.
Brahma Hari Har tumko dhyavain.
Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva meditate upon you.
Tab hi manvanchhit phal pavain.
Only then do they attain their desired fruits.
Darshan karat paap kati jaate.
Upon seeing you, sins are cut away.
Koti bhakt gan nitya nahate.
Millions of devotees bathe daily.
Jo nar tumko nit hi dhyavai.
The person who meditates on you daily.
Vah nar Rudra lok ko javain.
That person goes to the realm of Rudra (Shiva).
Magarmachha tum mein sukh pavain.
Crocodiles find happiness in you.
Antim samay parampad pavain.
And attain the supreme abode at the end of time.
Mastak mukut sada hi saajain.
A crown always adorns your head.
Paon paijani nit hi rajain.
Anklets always shine on your feet.
Kal-kal dhwani karti ho Mata.
O Mother, you make a murmuring sound.
Paap taap harti ho Mata.
O Mother, you remove sins and sorrows.
Poorab se Pashchim ki ora.
From East towards the West.
Bahtin Mata nachat mora.
You flow, O Mother, dancing like a peacock.
Shaunak rishi tumharau gun gavain.
Sage Shaunak sings your virtues.
Soot aadi tumharaun yash gavain.
Soot and others sing your praise.
Shiv Ganesh bhi tere gun gavain.
Shiv and Ganesha also sing your virtues.
Sakal dev gan tumko dhyavain.
All the gods meditate upon you.
Koti tirth Narmada kinare.
Millions of pilgrimage sites are on Narmada's banks.
Ye sab kehlate dukh haare.
These are all called the removers of sorrow.
Manokamna pooran karti.
You fulfill desires.
Sarv dukh Maa nit hi hartin.
O Mother, you always remove all sorrows.
Kankhal mein Ganga ki mahima.
In Kankhal, there is the glory of Ganga.
Kurukshetra mein Saraswati mahima.
In Kurukshetra, there is the glory of Saraswati.
Par Narmada gram jungle mein.
But Narmada resides even in villages and forests.
Nit rahti Mata mangal mein.
Mother always remains in auspiciousness.
Ek baar kar ke snana.
By bathing once.
Tarat pidhi hai nar nara.
The generations of man are liberated.
Mekal kanya tum hi Rewa.
O Rewa, you are the daughter of Mekal.
Tumhari bhajan karen nit deva.
Gods worship you daily.
Jata Shankari naam tumhara.
Jata Shankari is your name.
Tumne koti janon ko hai tara.
You have liberated millions of people.
Samodbhava Narmada tum ho.
You are the Narmada born of Shiva (Samodbhava).
Paap mochani Rewa tum ho.
You are Rewa, the liberator from sins.
Tumhari mahima kahi nahin jaayi.
Your glory cannot be described.
Karat na banti Matu badai.
It is difficult to praise you, O Mother.
Jal pratap tummein ati Mata.
O Mother, there is great power in your water.
Jo ramaniya tatha sukh daata.
Which is beautiful and a giver of happiness.
Chaal sarpini sam hai tumhari.
Your flow is like a serpent.
Mahima ati apar hai tumhari.
Your glory is infinite.
Tum mein padi asthi bhi bhari.
Even bones placed in you become heavy.
Chhuwat pashan hot var vari.
Touching them, stones become holy water.
Yamuna mein jo manuj nahata.
The man who bathes in the Yamuna.
Saat dino mein vah phal paata.
Gets the result in seven days.
Saraswati teen dino mein deti.
Saraswati gives fruit in three days.
Ganga turat baad hi deti.
Ganga gives it immediately after.
Par Rewa ka darshan karke.
But by having a vision of Rewa.
Manav phal paata man bhar ke.
Man gets the fruit to his heart's content.
Tumhari mahima hai ati bhari.
Your glory is very great.
Jisko gaate hain nar-nari.
Which men and women sing of.
Jo nar tum mein nitya nahata.
The man who bathes in you daily.
Rudra lok mein pooja jaata.
Is worshiped in Rudra lok.
Jadi butiyan tat par raajain.
Medicinal herbs shine on your banks.
Mohak drishya sada hi saajain.
Beautiful scenes always look lovely.
Vayu sugandhit chalti teera.
Fragrant air blows on your banks.
Jo harti nar tan ki peera.
Which removes the pain of the human body.
Ghat-ghat ki mahima bhari.
The glory of every bank is great.
Kavi bhi gaa nahin sakte saari.
Even poets cannot sing all of it.
Nahin jaanun main tumhari pooja.
I do not know how to worship you.
Aur sahara nahin mam dooja.
And I have no other support.
Ho prasann upar mam Mata.
Be pleased with me, O Mother.
Tum hi Matu moksh ki daata.
You are the Mother who grants liberation.
Jo manav yah nit hai padhta.
The human who reads this daily.
Uska maan sada hi badhta.
Their honor always increases.
Jo shat baar ise hai gaata.
The one who sings this a hundred times.
Vah vidya dhan daulat paata.
Attains knowledge, wealth, and riches.
Aganit baar padhai jo koi.
Anyone who reads it countless times.
Pooran manokamna hoi.
Their desires are fulfilled.
Sabke ur mein basat Narmada.
Narmada resides in the hearts of all.
Yahan vahan sarvatra Narmada.
Here, there, and everywhere is Narmada.

|| Doha ||
Bhakti bhav ur aani ke.
Bringing feelings of devotion into the heart.
Jo karta hai jaap.
The one who chants this.
Mata ji ki kripa se.
By the grace of Mother.
Door hot santap.
All sorrows are removed.

faq.q1: Why is the Narmada Chalisa recited?
faq.a1: Maa Narmada is considered the 'giver of salvation' (Mokshadayini) and is extremely holy. This Chalisa is recited for the purification of the mind, atonement for sins, mental peace, and to attain happiness and prosperity in life.
faq.q2: Is it necessary to go to the banks of the Narmada River to read the Chalisa?
faq.a2: No, it is not mandatory at all. You can recite it at your home shrine with full devotion by meditating on Maa Narmada.
faq.q3: What is the best day to recite it?
faq.a3: Monday is considered extremely auspicious for the worship of Maa Narmada. Apart from this, you can also recite it daily.
faq.q4: Are there any special benefits of reciting the Narmada Chalisa?
faq.a4: Yes, its recitation removes negative thoughts, brings positivity into the home, and the devotee receives the special grace and blessings of Maa Narmada.
faq.q5: Are there any complex rituals required to read it?
faq.a5: No, Maa Narmada is very simple and motherly. You can recite this Chalisa with full faith and love while keeping a vessel of clean water in front of you.
